message.content:
{
  "page_type": "other",
  "summary": "This is the cover page of a Carrier screw chiller manual (model 30HXC130A-400A). It displays the manufacturer logo, model number, equipment type in Chinese (螺杆冷水机组), nominal cooling capacity range (464-1392 kW), a photograph of the chiller unit, the manual type (startup, operation, and maintenance manual), publication date (September 2001), and the manufacturer's name in Chinese and English.",

    {"type": "logo", "label": "Carrier logo"},
    {"type": "logo", "label": "HFC-134a logo"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Model number: 30HXC130A-400A"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Equipment type: 螺杆冷水机组 (Screw Chiller)"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Nominal cooling capacity: 464-1392kW"},
    {"type": "image", "label": "Photograph of screw chiller unit"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Manual type: 开机、运行维护手册 (Startup, Operation, and Maintenance Manual)"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Publication date: 2001年9月版 (September 2001 Edition)"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Manufacturer (Chinese): 上海一冷开利空调设备有限公司"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Manufacturer (English): SHANGHAI YILENG CARRIER AIR-CONDITIONING EQUIP. CO.,"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Website watermark: 制冷百家网整理: www.zhilengbj.cn"}
  ],

  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["equipment_identification", "manual_metadata", "manufacturer_info"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "Carrier\n30HXC130A-400A\n螺杆冷水机组\n名义制冷量 464-1392kW\nHFC-134a\n开机、运行维护手册\n2001年9月版\n上海一冷开利空调设备有限公司\nSHANGHAI YILENG CARRIER AIR-CONDITIONING EQUIP. CO.,\n制冷百家网整理: www.zhilengbj.cn",

The relationships between entities (e.g., model to capacity) are inferred from text layout, not from explicit visual connectors.",

parsed.summary: This is the cover page of a Carrier screw chiller manual (model 30HXC130A-400A). It displays the manufacturer logo, model number, equipment type in Chinese (螺杆冷水机组), nominal cooling capacity range (464-1392 kW), a photograph of the chiller unit, the manual type (startup, operation, and maintenance manual), publication date (September 2001), and the manufacturer's name in Chinese and English.
